name: Curfex API
description:
Curfex integration API for business partner. This is a v2 version (released on 2022) replacing existing production version [Curfex API v1](https://app.swaggerhub.com/apis/curfex/curfex_api_v1).

All listed APIs are [rate limited](https://www.notion.so/curfex/Rate-Limiting-def3bf1a33e345c4b34580ea282f3deb)

Please contact us at tech@curfex.com if you need any help.
